2267360.name: Fragmented City
2267360.description:
Fragmented City is a first person adventure-exploration game somewhat inspired by immersive sims. Also, it's the spiritual successor to Through The Fragmentation and The Hidden Fragmentation.

STORY

A strange religious cult has appeared in the City, and it's up to you to find out what they want. Meanwhile you can investigate the mysterious disappearances, work for different groups and factions - or just explore the City.

Featured in the demo version:

  • Immerse yourself into an environment full of interactive details
  • Explore the streets of 'Hawkfields', jump on rooftops, crawl through ventillation shafts
  • Meet and talk to colorful characters with unique backstories
  • Gather money to buy various items for your apartment.
  • Read emails, play a minigame on your in-game computer
  • Discover hidden areas and collect special items - the City is full of secrets
  • And many more...
